programs.title: Man's Greatest Food
programs.desc: From the paper-thin crusts of New York, to the wood-fired ovens of the west coast, to the bottomless deep dish of Chicago, Roger presents the top fifteen pizza offerings in the whole country.

programs.title: Man's Greatest Food
programs.desc: From the Atlantic seaboard to the Pacific coast, down deep in the bayou and high in the Rockies, Roger travels America to reel in the fifteen very best seafood dishes.

programs.title: Man's Greatest Food
programs.desc: Roger Mooking travels across America in search of the 12 best chicken dishes; from frying and baking to grilling, Roger hangs out with chefs as they explore all the best ways to cook wings, pot pies, pizzas and other savory chicken dishes.

programs.title: Carnival Eats
programs.desc: Ingenious fair vendors use the humble potato to create some amazing and original midway food offerings.

programs.title: Carnival Eats
programs.desc: Bacon and Bourbon Fest in Wellington, Fla.; Stuffed Crust Bacon-Za; Peanut Butter Pork Donuts that hit the sweet and salty spot; ThurtenE Carnival at Washington University in St. Louis, where he gets his fill of delicious school spirit.

programs.title: Carnival Eats
programs.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Greater Baton Rouge State Fair for a helping of Cajun treats, like Cajun boudin tacos and pecan pie pops; basking in the lights of the Aurora Winter Festival in Toronto.
